ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Course number assigned to the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject category of the course */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider offering the course */,
  "course_date" TEXT /* Date when the course was scheduled */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours for course completion */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., live webinar, on-demand) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the course */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "state_requirements" TEXT /* State-specific requirements for the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Provider's website */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the provider is approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the participant */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Real estate license number of the participant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the participant's license */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the participant is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the participant registered for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who registered for the course */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the registration occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant completed the course */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade or score received by the participant */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the participant attended the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration corresponding to the certificate */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate was issued */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Unique certificate number */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate expires */,
  "renewal_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the certificate is renewable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject category */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject category */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the subject is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which feedback is provided */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for course improvement */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course as perceived by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
